title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby. El Condor
Pasa is fired up as cheers echo throughout the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads to the race, anticipating the looks of
respect she'll receive from her rivals after she's
won.
